title: Voice memo — Nov 21 2018 (no-content / dramatic music)
html:
1:02 voice memo from Nov 21 2018 (grants pass teen era Yahir, age ~15) — Whisper transcribed only ambient sound cues ("dramatic music", "whooshing"). No usable content; preserved as a graph node so the recording as note habit is visible from late 2018. Worth re-running on the larger Whisper model.

recording as note
